marketing.aboutUs: Kalkidan is the premier dating and discovery app built for the Habesha community — connecting Ethiopians, Eritreans, and the global diaspora through meaningful relationships, whether friendship, dating, or marriage.
marketing.description: Find your Kalkidan (destiny). Swipe, match, and connect with Habesha singles worldwide. Premium features include unlimited swipes, spotlight boosts, pre-match messages, and the Marriage Badge.
marketing.target: Habesha diaspora worldwide — Ethiopians and Eritreans aged 18-45

socialPosts.prompt: Show two hands reaching toward each other with Ethiopian coffee (buna) in the background. Text overlay: 'Your Kalkidan is waiting ☕💜'. Show the app interface briefly — a match notification popping up.

Split-screen carousel: Left side shows a beautiful Habesha wedding photo. Right side shows the app's Marriage Badge feature. Caption: 'Some swipes lead to forever 💍 The Marriage Badge shows you're serious.'

Fast-cut montage: Person scrolling bored on generic dating apps → deletes them → downloads Kalkidan → immediate match → excited reaction. Text: 'Tired of apps that don't get your culture? 🙄 Try the one built for YOU.' Trending Ethiopian music in background.
POV style: You're at a Habesha wedding. Everyone asks 'when is yours?' Cut to phone showing Kalkidan app with the Marriage Badge. Text: 'Speed up the process 😉💜'
Poll sticker: 'What's most important in a partner?' Options: 'Shared Culture 🇪🇹🇪🇷', 'Ambition 💼', 'Family Values 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦', 'Sense of Humor 😂'. Link sticker to kalkidan.app.

alternatives.reason: End-to-end typesafe APIs, no REST client needed
Realtime without polling, built-in reactive queries, less boilerplate than Supabase for chat features
No virtual DOM, ~50% smaller bundle, fine-grained reactivity, better performance on low-end devices

agents.stack: React 18 + Vite + Zustand + Supabase + Tailwind 4 + Capacitor

marketing.aboutUs: Pixwee lets photographers ghost events, capture candid moments, and sell pictures directly to attendees. No watermark, no waiting. Upload photos in real time, set your price, and get paid instantly.
marketing.description: Ghost events, capture moments, and sell photos instantly to attendees. Start earning with every shot. Turn every event into a revenue stream.
marketing.target: Event photographers, wedding photographers, party hosts, concert organizers — anyone who captures events and wants to sell photos directly to attendees

agents.auth: JWT (httpOnly cookies + Bearer token). Photographer/Admin/Seller roles. AppleSignIn Capacitor plugin. Firebase mixed in for native auth.
agents.stack: Express + TypeScript (backend) / React 18 + Vite + Tailwind 3 (frontend) / MySQL + Cloudflare R2 / Capacitor 8
agents.deploy: Hostinger API MCP (web), Xcode + altool (iOS TestFlight), Google Play MCP (Android internal)

marketing.aboutUs: GeezEasy makes learning the Ge'ez (Fidel) script fun and interactive. Master Tigrinya and Amharic alphabets through tracing, games, and quizzes.
marketing.description: Master the ancient Ge'ez (Fidel) script with fun, interactive lessons! GeezEasy makes learning Tigrinya and Amharic alphabets exciting for all ages. Features include letter tracing with guided strokes, memory games and quizzes, streaks and badges, parent zone, and more. Works offline.
marketing.target: Ethiopian and Eritrean families, diaspora kids, language learners of all ages
